no: Replaces 353 BG2 TIS + 1,813 PVRZ area background files via COPY to override (last writer wins). GAME_IS bg2ee eet — installs in EET BG2 phase. CONFLICT with BGGO (i=25): BGGO covers 6 BG2 areas using the same AR filenames: AR1102, AR1700, AR1900, AR5000, AR5200, AR6100. Whichever installs later wins. In infinity-insanity this installs after BGGO, so AI Denoised overrides BGGO for those areas. Pick one or the other; do not run both. NO conflict with SotSC/DSotSC/NToSC/1PP: those mods use unique area codes (l#xxx, dscxxx, arXXpb) or different file types. Install order: position here (after content mods, before final biffing) is correct to ensure final control over BG2 area visuals.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs
Conflict analysis: BGGO conflicts on 6 BG2 areas (AR1102/1700/1900/5000/5200/6100); SotSC/DSotSC/NToSC/1PP do not conflict

sum: AI-upscaled BG2 area backgrounds for sharper visuals at modern resolutions. Purely cosmetic, large file size.
